title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Kale Consultants - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Kale Consultants - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Kale Consultants family as a Backend Developer in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Kale Consultants:
Kale Consultants is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kale Consultants!
